title: Largest Sum of Averages
hints: Consider how you would solve this if K were fixed to a specific small number. How does adding one more group change the problem structure?
This problem exhibits optimal substructure and overlapping subproblems, suggesting dynamic programming. Define a state based on the index reached and groups used.
To compute the score efficiently when splitting at index j, use prefix sums to get the sum of any subarray in constant time.
